source.section: 6 - Markpoints > 6.1 - Markpoint Navigation > Navigation to an existing markpoint

steps.action: From the HSI page, Press the OSB (Option Select Button) next to WYPT to set tracking mode to WAYPOINT.
steps.voiced: On the HSI page, press the OSB next to WYPT to set tracking mode to Waypoint.

steps.action: To select a markpoint, press the OSBs to increment or decrement the waypoint number. Since the Waypoint Database can contain up to 60 waypoints and 9 additional markpoints (stored AFTER waypoint 59). I would suggest using the decrement OSB instead of the increment OSB (quicker way to go to the MK#). since going through 60 waypoints can be a bit time-consuming.
steps.voiced: Use the decrement OSB to select your markpoint — markpoints live after waypoint 59, so decrementing is faster.

steps.action: Use the HSI and HUD to navigate towards waypoint 6 - MARKPOINTS
steps.voiced: Navigate to the selected markpoint using the HSI and HUD.
